evidence: "I've been a Trekkie since the its beginning."
"This series is doing a better job of fitting together and answering the questions suggested by the Ring Trilogy."
"It's not as free moving as his other documentaries, but well worth the price."
"It almost seems like the writer were putting it together chapter by chapter."
"This is all Michael Moore. It's not as free moving as his other documentaries, but well worth the price."
"This season also has to have a 'Baltar' character to muddy otherwise good story line."
"The discs were well mastered and each has extra features that explain some of the historical background and stage info that was involved in the making of these films."
"This copy has the full movie, not the broadcast edit and also has a real life documentary of the film featuring the real Rudy."
"Cameron's coming out with three more sequels and I'm looking forward to seeing them."
"I was watching the old movies and saw the trailer for this tape."
"The graphics are great with really good sound."
"I just watched Avatar again and am already wanting to see it again."
"It was great seeing the old cast relive their work on the Star Trek set and equally great seeing Leonard Nimoy since his recent death."

summary: The user has a strong preference for sci-fi and fantasy genres, particularly enjoying series like Star Trek and Doctor Who. They value high production quality and visual spectacle, while showing a tendency towards slower-paced narratives that evoke emotional resonance.
